changes_since_last_audit.description: src/components (layouts + ra-wrappers + ui) now tracked as a named module. 41.9K LOC, 20 commits in 14 days.
sales commits-14d=17, exceeding CI/CD architectural review threshold (16+). SalesPermissionsTab.tsx at 5 edits/14d.
services commits-14d=10. sales.service.ts at 7 edits/14d. Test coverage improved to partial.
opportunities LOC stable at 26828. 9 commits in 14d. Phase 3 unchanged.
All other module LOC counts match previous baseline within rounding.

modules.name: providers
risk_factors: 24.7K LOC - largest module
38 commits in 30d 578 in 6mo - extremely high churn
Contains authProvider.ts - authentication and RLS enforcement
Contains composedDataProvider.ts - all DB access routes here
God class: composedDataProvider registers all resource handlers
3 circular references in dependency map
Auth mistakes lock out all users per CLAUDE.md Caution Zone

modules.name: opportunities
risk_factors: 26.8K LOC - largest feature module
36 commits in 30d 771 in 6mo - highest churn of all feature modules
19 fan-in and 10 fan-out - highest coupling in codebase
7-stage pipeline with transitions duplicate detection auth warnings
Kanban and slideOverTabs subdirectories add structural complexity
6 DB tables including junction and audit tables
Business-critical: directly drives MFB revenue pipeline KPIs

modules.name: src/components
risk_factors: 41.9K LOC - largest module by line count in entire codebase
20 commits in 14d - CI/CD architectural review threshold exceeded (16+)
ListToolbar.tsx has 7 edits in 14d - top file churn in module
Spans three tiers: ui (Tier 1), ra-wrappers (Tier 2), layouts, supabase auth pages
Broadly consumed by all feature modules - high blast radius
Tier boundary violations (UI-001, UI-002) risk spreading when mixed
AdaptiveFilterContainer.tsx and ListPageLayout.tsx are active hotspots

modules.name: validation
risk_factors: 91 fan-in dependents - most depended-upon module
34 commits in 30d - high churn for a shared schema module
19.7K LOC across 96 files
Schema changes cascade to all 91 dependent modules
Source-of-truth for all Zod schemas and TypeScript types

modules.name: contacts
risk_factors: 15.9K LOC across 80 files
31 commits in 30d - high churn
10 fan-out dependencies
CSV import wizard multi-step flow is complex
Junction table contact_organizations plus summary views
Touches papaparse and react-dropzone external dependencies

modules.name: organizations
risk_factors: 18.5K LOC across 97 files - second-largest feature module
37 commits in 30d - highest 30d churn among feature modules
Hierarchy parent-child adds self-referential complexity
Principal authorization with distributor_principal_authorizations table
Product exception management adds cross-module coupling
3 fan-in dependents (opportunities depends on organizations)

modules.name: dashboard
risk_factors: 13.5K LOC across 62 files
29 commits in 30d
Two competing versions PrincipalDashboardV3 and PrincipalDashboardV4
6 DB tables including dashboard_snapshots and user_favorites
DnD-kit drag-and-drop adds interaction complexity
Aggregates data from activities tasks and principal_opportunities

modules.name: reports
risk_factors: 9.6K LOC across 58 files
25 commits in 30d
5 fan-in dependents and 6 dependencies
Aggregates across multiple entities - cross-module read complexity

modules.name: filters
risk_factors: 4.9K LOC
No test files found
Filter components used across list views - regressions hard to detect
Debounced inputs and checkbox popovers add async complexity

modules.name: activities
risk_factors: 4.5K LOC across 24 files
20 commits in 30d
Draft persistence via localStorage is a stale-state risk
Activities drive 10+ activities/week KPI - business critical metric
Sample activity follow-up requirement adds branching logic

modules.name: products
risk_factors: 4.3K LOC across 27 files
19 commits in 30d
Partial test coverage (8 test files)
Junction table relationships to product_distributors
No BRD documentation found

modules.name: tasks
risk_factors: 3.8K LOC across 29 files
27 commits in 30d - high churn relative to module size
Partial test coverage (6 test files)
Snooze behavior adds temporal state complexity
Dashboard kanban grouping creates cross-module surface

modules.name: services
risk_factors: 4.6K LOC
8 fan-in dependents - relied upon by multiple modules
sales.service.ts has 7 edits in 14d - top churn file in codebase
Business workflow logic lives here per PRV-006
StorageService and ValidationService are shared infrastructure
Test coverage partial: sales.service.test.ts exists but other services lack tests

modules.name: sales
risk_factors: 17 commits in 14d - CI/CD architectural review threshold exceeded (16+)
SalesPermissionsTab.tsx has 5 edits in 14d - highest file churn in module
3.2K LOC across 20 files
Partial test coverage (3 test files for 20 source files)
Manages CRM user accounts and RBAC inputs
Disable and reassign dialog is a high-consequence operation

modules.name: hooks
risk_factors: 13 fan-in dependents - broadly consumed
useFilterCleanup.ts has 3 edits in 14d - active file
useFilterCleanup.test.ts provides some coverage but full suite unknown
7 shared mutable state instances in dependency map

modules.name: productDistributors
risk_factors: 11 fan-in dependents - high for a 508 LOC module
No test files - zero coverage
Junction entity: RLS must validate both FK sides per DB-008
Permissive junction policies are a known risk per DB-007

modules.name: timeline
risk_factors: 5 fan-in dependents consuming shared timeline rendering
No test files found
entity_timeline drives cross-entity audit trail
Rendering bugs affect contacts organizations and opportunities simultaneously

modules.name: tags
risk_factors: 932 LOC - small module
1 test file - minimal coverage
Tags used across contacts and organizations but module itself is simple

risk_factors: 7 fan-in dependents for a 530 LOC module
dompurify for HTML sanitization - XSS risk if misconfigured
No dedicated test files
Optimistic useUpdate requires careful query invalidation

modules.name: settings
risk_factors: 820 LOC - small module
No test files
No fan-in dependents - isolated blast radius
Low churn (2 commits in 30d)

modules.name: components
risk_factors: 7 fan-in dependents
No test files - shared components untested
MOD-002 concern: nested components folder inside feature area
1.2K LOC - manageable size

modules.name: notifications
risk_factors: 257 LOC - very small module
No test files
3 fan-in dependents
Low complexity

risk_factors: 27 LOC - minimal module thin wrapper over authProvider
Auth logic lives in providers/authProvider.ts
0 commits in 30d - stable

risk_factors: 318 LOC - small presentational module
5 fan-in dependents
No test files but layout is low logic density
0 commits in 30d - stable

7 fan-in dependents
Shared mutable state via React context

phase_1.rationale: Low LOC, low churn, isolated blast radius. Safe to refactor without broad regression risk.
entry_criteria: Local build verified: npm install and npx tsc --noEmit passes
npm run lint passes with zero errors
Developer has read CLAUDE.md and CORE_CONSTRAINTS.md
exit_criteria: All unit tests pass (npm run test)
No new console statements in production code (CMD-001)

phase_2.rationale: Moderate LOC, partial test coverage, or notable coupling. Validation has 91 dependents - changes must be verified broadly. Services layer is untested. productDistributors has RLS exposure.
entry_criteria: Phase 1 complete and exit criteria verified
Developer has reviewed dependency-map.json for fan-in counts
Validation schema changes reviewed by tech lead
RLS policies reviewed for junction-table changes per DB-008
exit_criteria: SQL dry-run passes: npx supabase db push --dry-run
Code review by two developers for validation or providers changes

phase_3.rationale: Large LOC (13K-42K), very high churn, business-critical logic, or auth/security. src/components newly elevated: 41.9K LOC, 20 commits/14d (CI threshold exceeded). composedDataProvider and authProvider are Caution Zones per CLAUDE.md. opportunities has highest historical coupling (19 fan-in, 10 fan-out, 771 commits in 6mo).
entry_criteria: Phase 2 complete and exit criteria verified
Playwright E2E smoke tests pass on staging
Tech lead review for changes to composedDataProvider.ts or authProvider.ts
Staging database snapshot taken before migration work
exit_criteria: Playwright E2E full suite passes on staging
Manual QA sign-off from product owner
RLS policy review completed if auth or access-control changes
Zero TypeScript errors and zero lint errors
Performance baseline verified: under 2s for principal dashboard queries
pgTAP security tests pass if RLS policies changed

regression_priorities.reason: Authentication flow and RLS policy enforcement. Mistakes lock out all users. Caution Zone per CLAUDE.md.
God class - all DB access routes through this file. 38 commits in 30d. Any change affects all resources simultaneously.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: Vitest unit tests per handler + integration smoke test

regression_priorities.reason: 41.9K LOC, 20 commits in 14d (CI/CD threshold exceeded). ListToolbar.tsx at 7 edits/14d. Broadly consumed by all feature modules. Tier boundary violations risk spreading.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: Vitest unit tests for ra-wrappers, visual regression for layout components

regression_priorities.reason: Highest coupling in codebase (19 fan-in, 10 fan-out). 771 commits in 6 months. Business-critical revenue pipeline. Stage transition logic and authorization warnings must not regress.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: Vitest unit + Playwright E2E for stage transitions and kanban board

regression_priorities.reason: 91 fan-in dependents. Schema shape changes cascade to every resource. Create schema strictness per CORE-005 must be maintained.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: Vitest unit tests for all schema boundaries

regression_priorities.reason: 17 commits in 14d exceeds CI/CD architectural review threshold (16+). SalesPermissionsTab.tsx has 5 edits in 14d. RBAC inputs and disable/reassign dialog are high-consequence operations.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: Vitest unit for permission rules + Playwright E2E for disable/reassign flow

regression_priorities.reason: Self-referential hierarchy, principal authorization management, and distributor_principal_authorizations table. RLS must enforce both FK sides per DB-008.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: Vitest + pgTAP for RLS on authorization tables

regression_priorities.reason: Multi-step CSV import wizard. Data integrity risk on bulk operations. 31 commits in 30d indicates active churn.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: Vitest unit for import steps + Playwright E2E for wizard flow

regression_priorities.reason: 8 fan-in dependents, zero test files. Business workflow logic per PRV-006. StorageService and ValidationService are shared infrastructure with no test coverage.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: Vitest unit tests for StorageService and ValidationService

regression_priorities.reason: Junction table with 11 fan-in dependents. Zero test coverage. RLS must validate both FK sides per DB-008 and DB-009.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: pgTAP RLS tests for product_distributors policies

regression_priorities.reason: dompurify used for HTML sanitization. Misconfigured sanitization allows XSS. 7 fan-in consumers. No dedicated test files.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: Vitest unit tests for sanitization boundary

regression_priorities.reason: Dual versions (V3/V4) create ambiguity. 6 DB tables aggregated. DnD-kit state complexity. 29 commits in 30d.
regression_priorities.recommended_test_type: Vitest unit for KPI calculations + Playwright E2E for dashboard render
